steps.action: Send initialize + notifications/initialized to MCP server
steps.observed: Server responded with protocolVersion 2024-11-05 and capabilities for tools, resources, prompts

steps.action: Send tools/call for list_available_metrics with empty arguments
steps.expected: Response with formatted metric types list (not 'No metrics found')
steps.observed: Response contains 12 metrics: active_calories, deep_sleep, hrv, readiness_score, rhr, sleep_duration, sleep_score, steps, heart_rate, spo2_interval, sleep_stage, workout — each with unit, category, and source

evidence.consoleErrors: none (stderr suppressed, no errors on stdout)
evidence.network: MCP server -> GET /api/health-data/types -> 200 (inferred from successful response)
evidence.jsonRpcResponse:
{"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Available Metrics

active_calories: Active Calories (kcal) [activity] — source: oura
deep_sleep: Deep Sleep (hr) [sleep] — source: oura
hrv: Heart Rate Variability (ms) [cardiovascular] — source: oura
readiness_score: Readiness Score (score) [recovery] — source: oura
rhr: Resting Heart Rate (bpm) [cardiovascular] — source: oura
sleep_duration: Sleep Duration (hr) [sleep] — source: oura
sleep_score: Sleep Score (score) [sleep] — source: oura
steps: Steps (steps) [activity] — source: oura
heart_rate: Heart Rate (bpm) [cardiovascular] — source: oura
spo2_interval: SpO2 (interval) (%) [cardiovascular] — source: oura
sleep_stage: Sleep Stage (—) [sleep] — source: oura
workout: Workout (—) [activity] — source: oura
"}]},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2}

steps.action: Send initialize + notifications/initialized to MCP server
steps.observed: Server responded with protocolVersion 2024-11-05 and capabilities

steps.action: Send tools/call for create_share with label, metrics, start_date, end_date, expires_in_days
steps.expected: Response with share URL in text format
steps.observed: Response contains 'Share Created Successfully' with label, URL (masked share token), metrics (sleep_score, steps), and date range (2026-01-01 → 2026-01-31)

evidence.network: MCP server -> POST /api/shares -> 200 (inferred from successful share creation)
evidence.jsonRpcResponse:
{"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Share Created Successfully

Label: MCP Fix Test Share
URL: Share token: *******************************************
Metrics: sleep_score, steps
Date range: 2026-01-01 → 2026-01-31
"}]},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2}

assertions.title: metric preference tools work (set, list, delete)

steps.action: Send tools/call for set_metric_preference with metric_type=hrv, source=oura
steps.observed: Response: 'Preference set: hrv → oura. Totus will now use oura as the source for hrv data.'

steps.expected: List showing hrv preference (not 'No metrics found' or empty due to array unwrapping bug)
steps.observed: Response: 'Source Preferences: hrv → oura (set 2026-03-11). 1 preference(s) set. All other metrics use auto-resolution.'

steps.action: Send tools/call for delete_metric_preference with metric_type=hrv
steps.observed: Response: 'Preference cleared: hrv. Totus will now use auto-resolution for hrv (most recent data source wins).'

jsonRpcResponses.set: {"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Preference set: hrv → oura\n\nTotus will now use oura as the source for hrv data."}]},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2}
jsonRpcResponses.delete: {"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Preference cleared: hrv\n\nTotus will now use auto-resolution for hrv (most recent data source wins)."}]},"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2}

frictions.description: create_share tool requires a 'label' parameter that is not mentioned in the validation contract assertion description. First attempt without label failed with Zod validation error.
frictions.resolution: Added label parameter to the create_share call

frictions.description: set_metric_preference tool uses 'source' parameter name (not 'provider'). Parameter name differs from the API endpoint which uses 'provider'.
frictions.resolution: Used correct parameter name 'source' as per tool schema

summary: Tested 3 assertions (VAL-MCP-003, VAL-MCP-004, VAL-MCP-011): all 3 passed. The fixes from commit 1bc8111 are verified working. list_available_metrics now correctly reads data.types (returns 12 metrics), create_share now sends correct field names (allowed_metrics, data_start, data_end), and list_metric_preferences now correctly unwraps data.preferences array (shows preferences instead of empty/error).
